sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44305" key="eu)kratoposi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐκρᾱτο-ποσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n44305.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drinking of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εὔκρατον</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:5:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
